The Rider

Built for
This

Josh Wood is 17 years old, American, and based in Spain. He has one goal: to race at the highest level of motorcycle sport. That kind of focus at that age is rare — and it shows on the track.


He trains full-time at SPN Academy under coach Nico Ferreira, one of the most respected development environments in junior motorcycle racing. The work is daily — on the bike, in the gym, refining the margins that separate competitive riders from the rest. He was selected from approximately 120 riders worldwide for the Red Bull Rookies Cup tryouts, one of the most demanding talent identification processes in global motorsport.


In 2026 he competes in JuniorGP — the FIM's official road to MotoGP. Seven races across Europe, broadcast live across 14 international platforms.

Track Record

What He's
Already Done

01
Red Bull Rookies Cup
Selected from approximately 120 riders worldwide for the Red Bull Rookies Cup tryouts — one of the most competitive junior talent identification programmes in global motorcycle racing.
02
SPN Academy
Training full-time at SPN Academy under elite coach Nico Ferreira, alongside riders from across the JuniorGP field in a structured professional development environment.
03
Race Experience
Competed in Spain's national Cups, the Moto 5 and Pre Moto 3 series of the MIR Cup, and competitive resistance races — building race craft against the strongest junior fields in the country.

Sponsorship

Why Partner
With Josh

01 — Visibility
3M+ Viewers Per Race
Logo placement on bike, suit and helmet visible across 14 international broadcast platforms including DAZN, Sky+, and the FIM JuniorGP YouTube channel.
02 — Timing
Early Positioning
JuniorGP is the proven pathway — Márquez, Lorenzo, and today's MotoGP grid came through this system. Partners who commit now carry forward as Josh progresses.
03 — Authenticity
Real Racing Environment
Josh trains and races at the highest junior level. Content, coverage, and brand association comes from genuine performance — not manufactured exposure.
04 — Flexibility
Tiered Packages
Partnership structures from €500 to €25,000+ with clear deliverables at each level. Product partnerships considered alongside financial sponsorship.
05 — Engagement
Digital & Social
Race weekend content, behind-the-scenes access, and custom campaign integration across Josh's social platforms and the JuniorGP broadcast network.
06 — Access
Race Day Presence
Upper-tier partners receive paddock access, event day presence, and direct engagement with Josh and the JWRA team across the European race calendar.
